author: hodie
description: Allows defining 'selector' properties (e.g., selector.status) which display as interactive dropdown menus with pre-defined options in both the standard Properties View and inside Bases views. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: hodie
manifest.description: Allows defining 'selector' properties (e.g., selector.status) which display as interactive dropdown menus with pre-defined options in both the standard Properties View and inside Bases views.
manifest.name: Custom Selectors

name: Custom Selectors

releases.author: hodie
releases.description:
## What's new

- **Fixed Bases table support**: Dropdowns now work in Obsidian Bases table view
- **Per-selector default values**: Toggle to auto-set the first option when creating files from Bases via +New, scoped per-Base by folder
- **Cross-view sync**: Changing a selector in Properties view updates Bases immediately, and vice versa
- **Multi-tab fix**: Properties view now correctly targets the right file when the same note is open in multiple tabs, and dropdowns sync across tabs
- **Settings UI overhaul**: Grouped settings with inline code styling, dynamic labels, and cross-platform layout
- **Auto-prefix**: Property names are automatically prefixed with `selector.`
- **Plugin guidelines compliance**: All eslint-plugin-obsidianmd rules pass
